description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a spacious, landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence. The house features large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor connectivity. The front includes a driveway with a car parked, a garage, and a manicured lawn with decorative shrubs and trees. The backyard boasts a swimming pool, sun loungers, a hammock, and a shaded outdoor dining area, as well as a small garden shed and children's playhouse. The upper floor has balconies with glass railings, offering views of the garden and pool area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roof, large glass windows, balconies, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool, garden, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, manicured lawn, and upper balcony.
description_view_1: Backyard view highlighting the swimming pool, sun loungers, hammock, outdoor dining area, and garden shed.
description_view_2: Rear side view displaying the full length of the house, backyard fence, and playhouse.
description_view_3: Side view with visible balconies, glass railings, driveway, and additional garden features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, direct access from driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
